code:
import io
import string

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
mut found = false
mut result = ""

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      let line = string.substring(s, start, i)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        result = line
        found = true
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if start < n
  let line = string.substring(s, start, n)
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
    result = line
    found = true
  end
end

if found
  println(result)
else
  println("(none)")
end
